zh.lifeSummary: 當Hedwig von Meißen於1205年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫可萊斯 明登梅斯時，她的父親Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen43歲，母親Jutta von Thüringen11202歲。她和Dietrich VI. von Kleve至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1249年2月2日在德國海因里希_海普洛文次可列福享年44歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Meißen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Dieter, Ernst.
North German and Dutch: patronymic from   Mein   1.

variants.name: Mein
meanings: German and Dutch: from the ancient Germanic personal name Maino, Meino, a short form of various compound names with the first element magin ‘strength, might’, for example Meinhardt . Compare Main 7.
German: nickname from Middle High German mein ‘mean, nasty’.

Scottish and English: perhaps a variant of Main or Meen. Meen is either a nickname from Middle English mene ‘inferior, lowly; poor; unpleasant’, from the Middle English personal name Mene (which is of uncertain origin). Alternatively, it could conceivably be a habitational name from East and West Meon (Hampshire), which take their names from the river Meon (of unexplained etymology).

nameMeanings.name: Hedwig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Hedwig von Meißen was born in 1205, in Meißen, Kreis Minden, Westphalia, Prussia, Germany, her father, Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen, was 43 and her mother, Jutta von Thüringen, was 11202. She had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Dietrich VI. von Kleve. She died on 2 February 1249, in Kleve, Rhineland, Prussia, Germany, at the age of 44, and was buried in Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.Meißen, Kreis Minden, Westphalia, Prussi: Meißen, Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hedwig von Meißen est née en 1205, à Meißen, Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Jutta von Thüringen, avait 11202 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Dietrich VI. von Kleve. Elle est décédée le 2 février 1249, à Kleve, Rhénanie, Prusse, Allemagne, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.Meißen, Kreis Minden, Westphalia, Prussi: Meißen, Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Hedwig von Meißen 1205 in Meißen, Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen 43 und ihre Mutter Jutta von Thüringen 11202. Sie hatte mit Dietrich VI. von Kleve mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. Februar 1249 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Kleve, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, Deutschland und wurde in Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Dietrich VI. von Kleve. ko.Meißen, Kreis Minden, Westphalia, Prussi: 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 민든 이ss
ko.lifeSummary: Hedwig von Meißen(이)가 1205년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 민든 이ss에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jutta von Thüringen(은)는 11202세였다. 그녀는 Dietrich VI. von Kleve(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1249년 2월 2일 독일 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 클브에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 클브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hedwig von Meißen nasceu em 1205, em Meißen, Kreis Minden, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Jutta von Thüringen, tinha 11202 anos. ru.Meißen, Kreis Minden, Westphalia, Prussi: миssен, крис минден, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hedwig von Meißen родилась в 1205 г. в местности миssен, крис минден, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Dietrich der Bedrängte von Meißen было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Jutta von Thüringen, 11202. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Dietrich VI. von Kleve. Она умерла 2 февраля 1249 г. в местности клив, раинпровинз, Пруссия, Германия в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.
